'''Mensix Corp''' was the parent company of [[Mensix Mining Company]], running the largest mining operation on [[Mustafar/Legends|Mustafar]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. After [[Klegger Corporation]] folded, Mensix Corp took over by establishing the [[Mensix Mining Facility/Legends|Mensix Mining Facility]].

Mensix Corp was founded by [[Milo Mensix]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Trials of Obi-Wan]]'' {{1stm}}
